Anti Aging Board  Certified Aesthetic Plastic Surgery From Flab to Fab! Our Services Vaser Liposelection An advanced, safe and gentle Ultrasound technology that allows specific, targeted removal of fat without damaging other tissues. Done for weight loss as well as body sculpting. More >> Body Contouring Nips-and tucks! These procedures help you get the shape and size you desire. Often needed nowadays after massive weight loss and Bariatric Surgery. More >> VASER Hi-Def Vaser Hi-Def is an advanced body contouring technique that can make you look ripped by highlighting the musculature. Get your Six-Packs here! More >> Breast Procedures The bust is a personal, emotional issue with women, and can undergo major changes in life. Plastic Surgery can help restore your confidence. More >> Facial Procedures The face is the window to a person’s life, and looking young and fresh can help with your confidence, life and career. Anti-Ageing is the way to go! More >> Non Surgical Procedures Minor procedures and techniques that anyone can do, to stay fit and young! Often done as “office procedures” with no downtime. More >> Female Procedures Specific to Women’s needs, such as post pregnancy changes to the entire body, etc. Why shouldn’t you be as great as you were before? More >> Male Procedures To take you where you want to go, but cannot due to life constraints! Get that perfect Gym Body! More >> General Plastic Surgery - Skin, Scars, wounds, etc The common little everyday problems such as corns, skin lesions, warts, boils, wounds, torn earlobes, scars, etc…. More >> About Us Dr Rustom F Ginwalla is a trained Board Certified Plastic and Aesthetic surgeon, with a special interest in the field of cosmetic surgery. He completed his basic medical and surgical training at the Kasturba Medical College, Mangalore and his training in Plastic Surgery at Bombay Hospital of Medical Sciences, Mumbai. He has worked for six years at Bombay Hospital under the able guidance of senior plastic surgeons, gaining valuable insight and honing his surgical skills. Here, he has also gained a lot of experience in surgery of the hand. He has also completed a Fellowship of the Royal College of Surgeons of Edinburgh (F.R.C.S.Ed.).
